hotel_name: Nhà nghỉ Thuận Phát (Thuan Phat House Soc Trang)

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Toilet có nhiều chỗ bị rỉ sét. Vòi sen rỉ sét. Không thường xuyên thay thảm chùi chân. Những trang thiết bị khác ở mức tương đối.
reviews.response:
KS Thuận Phát House xin chân thành cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá khách sạn! House sẽ ghi nhận góp ý của bạn và sẽ đưa ra phương án cải thiện nhằm nâng cao sự hài lòng về chất lượng dịch vụ của khách sạn.
Xin cảm ơn và hẹn gặp lại bạn một ngày gần nhất ạ!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful staff 👍
reviews.negatives: The room smells musty and the bathroom stinks 👎🏿

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: It is ok for stop by
reviews.response: Thank you very much for staying with us and for your kind review. We are happy you had a good time here.

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives: Ubicación e instalaciones
reviews.negatives: Salía del baño olor a podrido, a tubería y era insoportable. Pasaba por momentos y era muy desagradable.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Okie with price and service
reviews.response: Dear guest, We sincerely thank you for your rating! We are very pleased to have satisfied you at our hotel. We look forward to welcoming you back next time. All the best to you and your beloved ones. Best regards, Thuan Phat House

reviews.title: on ne pourra plus y revenir
reviews.positives: les personnelles étaient très gentilles et sympathiques
reviews.negatives: le système d'internet n'était pas fiable , il était très faible

reviews.title: Good location and worth for money paying
reviews.text: Location in the central, closed to local market and local food stall and about 10mn walk to bus station.  Everything good but would be the best if they staff can speak English more. Anyways, staff tried to use Google translate and assist us well. Will go again next time

reviews.title: Bof
reviews.positives: L’hôtel est au centre de la ville, bien placé.
reviews.negatives: La chambre était très sale (insectes morts et cheveux sous les lits), la salle de bain était très vieille et mal entretenue (la porte ne fermait pas, joints sales)

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Giá thành hợp lý với một vị trí như vậy. Chỉ tiếc là nhà vệ sinh hơi hôi và nước bị nhiễm mặn. Nhưng lần tới tôi sẽ trở lại vì khách sạn yên tĩnh, nhân viên hỗ trợ nhiệt tình và vị thế rất gần trung tâm. Mọi thứ suýt hoàn hảo

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: chambre spacieuse, confortable, salle d'eau très correcte.
reviews.negatives: nous avions une chambre qui donne sur la rue. Juste à l'entrée de l'hôtel se trouve un lampadaire sur le quel sont fixes les hauts parleurs qui servent à  communiquer tous les jours les informations à la population. Vous êtes sûrs d'être réveillés à  5h30 du  matin.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Really helpful, clean, tidy, value for money, comfortable bed… little bit out of the main area but we were very happy to walk in and out no problem.
reviews.response:
Dear guest, 
We sincerely thank you for your rating! We are very pleased to have satisfied you at our hotel. We look forward to welcoming you back next time. All the best to you and your beloved ones. 
Best regards,

reviews.title: Super hôtel. Je recommande !
reviews.positives: Un hôtel proche du centre. Le personnel est vraiment très agréable et arrangeant. Hôtel propre.
reviews.negatives: Xxxx

reviews.title: Convenient, clean and spacious
reviews.text: I've found this a good place to stay for a night in Soc Trang. There's a supermarket not too far, lots of local eating places and of course coffee shops. It's about a 10 minute walk to the bus station.
reviews.response: Dear guest, We sincerely thank you for your rating! We are very pleased to have satisfied you at our hotel. We look forward to welcoming you back next time. All the best to you and your beloved ones. Best regards, Thuan Phat House

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Parfait !

reviews.title: Comfortable and clean
reviews.text: The hotel is good value for the money with comfortable amenities. The front desk staff helped me organize bus transportation and were lovely and knowledgeable.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your feedback and we look forward to welcoming you back to soon. Sincerely,

reviews.title: Pour une nuit parfait
reviews.positives: Hôtel tout neuf possédant de grandes chambres personnel très sympa
reviews.negatives: Le bruit de la rue mais la nuit ça se calme

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Phòng sạch đẹp, tiện nghi, thang máy tốt,  vị trí tốt, phù hợp mức giá của Agoda.
Tầng 5 nước mạnh quá.
Không có nước đá, đi tìm mua xung quanh hơi xa
reviews.response: Khách sạn Thuận Phát xin cám ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá . Rất mong được đón tiếp bạn đến với khách sạn trong thời gian sớm nhất Chúc bạn một ngày tốt lành.

reviews.title: Nur wenn es absolut sein muss
reviews.positives: Das Personal war trotz unserer späten Ankunft um Mitternacht sehr bemüht, uns mit der Taxibestellung für den nächsten Tag zu helfen.
reviews.negatives: Wir mussten einmal die Zimmer wechseln, weil im ersten am Boden Mäusekot lag, das Bett nicht bezogen war und ein seltsamer Geruch im Raum war. Das zweite Zimmer war okay, aber auch nicht besonders sauber. Beide Zimmer waren sehr hellhörig und unbequeme Matratzen.

reviews.title: 2025 Vacation
reviews.text: Hotel staff were friendly; the room was clean.
reviews.response: Khách sạn Thuận Phát House xin cám ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá . Rất mong được đón tiếp bạn đến với khách sạn trong thời gian sớm nhất ạ. Chúc bạn một ngày tốt lành

reviews.positives: Lage
reviews.negatives:
Sauberkeit, Internet und Verständigung...sind stark verbesserungsbedürftig
Die Bäder sind renovierungsbedürftig  !!

reviews.title: Good value, nice pleasant stay
reviews.text: They had a lovely Christmas tree in the lobby.  Plenty of off-street parking, good staff, nice clean hotel.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your feedback and we look forward to welcoming you back to soon. Sincerely,

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Sehr gute Lage,bequeme Zimmer..
reviews.negatives:
Internet trotz Reklamation und entsprechendem Zimmer-Wechsel ziemlich schlecht...
Das Reinigungs-Personal macht nicht nur früh am Morgen lautstark Geräusche sondern auch unzureichend sauber- vor allem Duschwände aus Glas, Bettenrückwand aus Leder und Ledersessel wurden schon ewig nicht gereinigt..

reviews.title: clean
reviews.text: A nice clean hotel, the room was on the small side for three people but it was comfortable enough. Was central enough if you have a mode of transport, might be a little inconvenient if you are walking everywhere.

reviews.title: Convenient location
reviews.text: Good location in town centre. The room is spacious and bright. Bathroom water pressure is good. Cleanliness could be improved but acceptable for this area. Staff is nice and helpful.

reviews.title: Gute Wahl um Soc Trang kennenzulernen
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist perfekt da man ich sehr zentral befindet. Vom Markt etwa 200m entfernt,wo es selbst frische Brötchen gibt. Natürlich auch Cafés und viele kleine und grosse Restaurants im Umkreis von 1 km…
reviews.negatives: Leider ist die Verständigung nicht wirklich gut und das Reinigungspersonal nicht gerade leise…

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: May I will return. Very polite and cute receptionists.
reviews.response: Khách sạn Thuận Phát xin cám ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá . Rất mong được đón tiếp bạn đến với khách sạn trong thời gian sớm nhất Chúc bạn một ngày tốt lành.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Mooi schoon en comfortabel hotel die ik iedereen kan aanbevelen. De dames bij de receptie waren zeer behulpzaam zover dat kon. Het hotel staat aan een grote brede weg maar in de kamer was het 's nachts rustig.
Ontbijten kon niet maar wij deden dat  10 minuten lopen bij Highlands.
reviews.negatives: Wij waren de enige touristen in de stad en niemand sprak Engels wat mij een eenzaam gevoel gaf. Op straat werden we door iedereen aangekeken alsof we van een andere planeet waren. De vermeldingen van Google betreffende de bezienswaardigheden waren onjuist of erg verouderd zodat we door de taxichauffeurs naar onjuiste plekken werden gebracht. Dit heeft niets met het hotel te maken die deden hun best om het ons naar de zin te maken. Ik was blij dat we weer vertrokken.

reviews.title: Everything was good
reviews.text:
This was one of the nicest hotels that I have stayed in while touring Vietnam.
Everything worked. Hot water in the shower, good leathery soap and shampoo, TV worked OK. The cleaning was a very high standard.
Staff were helpful when needed. 
No restaurant but plenty nearby.
For the price it was very very good.
reviews.response: Khách sạn Thuận Phát House xin cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá . Rất mong được đón tiếp bạn đến với khách sạn trong thời gian sớm nhất ạ. Chúc bạn một ngày tốt lành

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nha nghi ko tốt
reviews.negatives: Ko đạt yêu cầu

reviews.title: The room is decent for the price.
reviews.text: The room is decent for the price, staff is friendly and quick. The bed is quite large, it fits two people comfortably. There’s a smart TV, wifi, and free bottled water. However, the room is a bit slippery and damp (there's an old smell and the walls are also slightly mouldy), the toilet is clean with hot and cold water, but the toilet bowl is a bit old, and I hope the hotel can reconsider the attitude of the security guard. I know he's older, so he might be a bit uncomfortable helping us with the bikes, but when I asked for help, he told me to "just go in and take care of it myself," which was really hurtful to hear. This needs to be addressed! Thank you very much.

reviews.title: I have been here many times.
reviews.text: The location is easy to find and convenient for exploring nearby. There is enough parking space for a few cars. The hotel is clean and well-equipped. I deducted one star because the bathroom only has a handheld shower, with no standing shower or direct water spout. The staff is quite professional. When I arrived, they called my name and I received my room right away (I booked through Agoda and had already paid). The price is relatively good. I have stayed here multiple times and both branches are fine.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Big rooms, comfy bed, nice sitting chairs and a good desk. Near the bus station.
reviews.negatives: Wifi in the rooms on the higher floors barely worked. My first night I was on 1st floor, worked fine, but second night on the 3rd floor it was very poor. Rooms look onto the main road so there is a little bit of noise but the windows are soundproofed quite well.

reviews.title: Great for stopping over before getting the ferry to Con Dao
reviews.positives: It was a big room but the bed was hard. Perfect for a one night stop to get the ferry to Con Dao.
reviews.negatives: The bed was hard.

reviews.title: Review of Thuan Phat Hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and secure because it's located across from the committee office, and the reception staff is lovely. I checked in very late, and they called to confirm and provided great support. I will stay here again if I visit Soc Trang.
reviews.response: KS Thuận Phát House xin chân thành cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá khách sạn ạ! Với đánh giá này là động lực để khách sạn không ngừng cố gắng, hoàn thiện hơn. KS Thuận Phát House cảm ơn và hẹn gặp lại bạn một ngày gần nhất ạ!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very helpful staff!

reviews.title: Optimal als Zwischenstopp auf meiner Reise nach Con Dao
reviews.text: Viele Stunden habe ich im Zimmer nicht verbracht, dafür war es sauber, Bett etwas hart, aber ordentlich gemacht, nahe des Busbahnhofs, und loben muss/will ich das Personal, dass mir mit meinem Shuttle Bus zum Hafen sofort geholfen, die Kommunikation auf vietnamesisch mit der Fähre übernommen und mich mit einem Haus-eigenen Motorrad zum Ticket Office & zum Shuttle Bus gebracht hat. Also ideal als Zwischenstopp auf die Insel Con Dao.

reviews.title: Thuận Phát House
reviews.text: Tuyệt vời

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Cần xem lại xử lý mùi trong phòng
Hệ thống và phòng tolet sạch đẹp hơn
reviews.response: Xin chào quý khách, Cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn của chúng tôi.. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi nhận được những lời nhận xét tốt từ bạn và lấy đó làm động lực để cố gắng mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm tốt hơn nữa. Một lần nữa, cảm ơn Quý khách rất nhiều và chúng tôi mong sớm được chào đón bạn trở lại . Trân trọng

reviews.title: Bra beliggenhet om du skal reise med ferge
reviews.text:
Personalet var vennlige, hjelpsomme og snakket godt engelsk. Som en som reise alene setter jeg pris på at det er litt rimeligere med et rom for kun én person.

En bonus var gratis tilgang til et bra treningssenter. Senteret ligger litt unna, men det var også inkludert gratis taxi til og fra treningssenteret.

reviews.title: Old facility
reviews.text: The room was ok. Good service but old facilities
reviews.response: KS Thuận Phát House xin chân thành cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian đánh giá khách sạn ạ! House sẽ ghi nhận góp ý của bạn và sẽ đưa ra phương án cải thiện nhằm nâng cao sự hài lòng về chất lượng dịch vụ của khách sạn. Xin cảm ơn và hẹn gặp lại bạn một ngày gần nhất ạ!
